extract: Stakataka (Japanese: ツンデツンデ Tundetunde) is a dual-type Rock/Steel Pokémon introduced during Generation VII, in Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon. It is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon. It is one of the Ultra Beasts and is codenamed UB Assembly (Japanese: ＵＢ：ＬＡＹ UB: Lay) by the International Police.
